title: Mercury: Cross-Architecture Hot-Dim Geometry Database for 23 LLMs
description: Mercury MCP exposes a 23-LLM cross-architecture observation database (13 architecture families) to any agent that speaks the Model Context Protocol. Built entirely on consumer hardware (Mac mini + NVIDIA DGX Spark) at near-zero compute cost. Provides per-model anchor dimension data, per-layer functional fingerprints, and cross-architecture layer alignment matrices. Key finding: dimension 11 appears in top-50 hot dims of 11/18 models including AllenAI's fully-independent OLMo2, providing the first large-scale empirical evidence for the anchor universality hypothesis (Olah et al.). Strongest cross-architecture layer alignment: qwen-7B layer 15 ↔ falcon-7B layer 16 at similarity 0.868.
